name: Generate Flux Image
description: Generate images using Flux2 models with separate UNet, CLIP, and VAE loaders. Uses a custom advanced sampling pipeline (SamplerCustomAdvanced) with Flux2Scheduler, CFGGuider, and KSamplerSelect. Only the 'prompt' parameter is required — all others have sensible defaults. The response contains an 'image_markdown' field with the URL to embed. CRITICAL: You MUST include the generated image in your response to the user by embedding the markdown image URL from image_markdown — e.g. ![image](asset_url). Never just link the URL; always embed it.
